Variables.Name: ServerTravelPause
Variables.Description: Amount of time a server will wait before traveling to next map, gives clients time to receive final RPCs on existing level @see NextSwitchCountdown

Variables.Name: SpawnPrioritySeconds
Variables.Description: @todo document

Variables.Name: RelevantTimeout
Variables.Description: @todo document

Variables.Name: KeepAliveTime
Variables.Description: @todo document

Variables.Name: InitialConnectTimeout
Variables.Description: Amount of time to wait for a new net connection to be established before destroying the connection

Variables.Name: IgnoreNetReadyReplicateActorCount
Variables.Description: Number of prioritized actors which should ignore IsNetReady when gets replicated

Variables.Name: ConnectionTimeout
Variables.Description:
Amount of time to wait before considering an established connection timed out.
	  Typically shorter than the time to wait on a new connection because this connection
	  should already have been setup and any interruption should be trapped quicker.

Variables.Name: TimeoutMultiplierForUnoptimizedBuilds
Variables.Description:
A multiplier that is applied to the above values when we are running with unoptimized builds (debug)
	 or data (uncooked). This allows us to retain normal timeout behavior while debugging without resorting
	 to the nuclear 'notimeouts' option or bumping the values above. If ==0 multiplier = 1

Variables.Name: bNoTimeouts
Variables.Description: If true, ignore timeouts completely.  Should be used only in development

Variables.Name: ServerConnection
Variables.Description: Connection to the server (this net driver is a client)

Variables.Name: ClientConnections
Variables.Description: Array of connections to clients (this net driver is a host)

Variables.Name: World
Variables.Description: World this net driver is associated with

Variables.Name: NetConnectionClass
Variables.Description: The loaded UClass of the net connection type to use

Variables.Name: RoleProperty
Variables.Description: @todo document

Variables.Name: NetDriverName
Variables.Description: Used to specify the net driver to filter actors with (NAME_None || NAME_GameNetDriver is the default net driver)

Variables.Name: Time
Variables.Description: Accumulated time for the net driver, updated by Tick
